name: Stellar Habits
tagline: Your habits are stars waiting to be lit.
description: A habit tracker that replaces checkboxes with an interactive night sky. Hold your habits to watch them glow. A small, satisfying ritual that turns consistency into something beautiful.

features.title: Hold-to-Light Ritual
features.description: Press and hold each habit to watch your star glow brighter. A mindful moment that makes completion feel meaningful.

features.title: Personal Constellations
features.description: Your habits form constellations in your night sky. Build patterns that are uniquely yours.

features.title: Year Spiral
features.description: See your entire year of consistency mapped onto a beautiful spiral. Watch your universe grow.

features.title: Smart Reminders
features.description: Gentle, timely nudges that fit your schedule. Not nagging - just a quiet reminder from the stars.

features.title: Evening Ritual Mode
features.description: A focused end-of-day review that helps you reflect and prepare for tomorrow.

features.title: Pro Tier
features.description: Unlock unlimited habits, advanced analytics, custom themes, and priority support.

faqs.question: How is Stellar Habits different from other habit trackers?
faqs.answer: Stellar Habits replaces the anxiety of streaks and checkboxes with a meditative ritual. You hold each habit to light it - a small moment of mindfulness that makes building habits feel beautiful, not pressured.

faqs.question: What does hold-to-light mean?
faqs.answer: Instead of tapping a checkbox, you press and hold each habit card. As you hold, your star glows brighter. Release when it's fully lit. It's a deliberate, satisfying ritual that takes just a few seconds.

faqs.question: Is there a streak counter?
faqs.answer: No - by design. Streaks create anxiety and punish you for missing a day. Stellar Habits shows your overall consistency over time without the pressure of maintaining a streak.

faqs.question: What's included in Stellar Habits Pro?
faqs.answer: Pro unlocks unlimited habits (free tier has 5), detailed consistency analytics, custom star colors and themes, widget support, and the year spiral view.
